tweets.text: Depends on the job, but if they require a degree and you claim to have one, the background screening will connect with the university’s database and verify. Source: I worked for a background screener for nearly 4 years and did this all the time

As someone in HR who reviews the background check, I promise if it says required we’re checking for it. I had a doctor, licensed in NY, and I still had to reach out to his German university to verify his degree. If the company doesn’t hold the same standard for all roles, run.

Blockchain is a game changer for education.

Learning credentials are a key part of that.

Once learning credentials are on chain, they become portable, trusted, and globally recognized.

Students turn every course, badge, and degree into a lifelong learner passport they control.

By leveraging blockchain technology, MEHR ensures that every certificate issued for medical, engineering, and educational training is permanently recorded and easily verifiable, eliminating fraud.
